title: Ikiru
tmdbOverview: Kanji Watanabe is a middle-aged man who has worked in the same monotonous bureaucratic position for decades. Learning he has cancer, he starts to look for the meaning of his life.
synopsis: Ikiru is a 1952 drama film from Japan. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.3 on IMDb. A standout of 1950s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a PG certification (AU rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
